subcodes.first_line: O Husayn! A call was raised from the Kingdom of Utterance, and that utterance did signify and give proof of whatsoever existeth in the realm of possibility [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حسین یک ندا از ملکوت بیان مرتفع شد و آن بیان مدل و مشعر بود بر آنچه در امکان
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @predictions and prophecies, @consolation and comfort, @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
